title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What quality do you most admire in people? Why?
How important is honesty to you in your personal relationships?
What values did you grow up with that you still hold today?
Has your opinion on any important topic changed significantly in recent years?
What decision in your life are you most proud of?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: What do you think it means to have strong personal values?
Do you think it is ever acceptable to lie? Why or why not?
Who has been the most important role model in your life? Why?
